pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 57 (raw headers) and 75 (conversation subject creation)

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task creates a synthetic email with subject 'URGENT: Confidential Wire Transfer Request' in the mailbox named 'Executive Support'. The email contains a randomly generated IP address from the TEST-NET-3 range (203.0.113.0/24) in the X-Originating-IP header field (setup_task.sh lines 20-21: RAND_OCTET=$((1 + $RANDOM % 254)), TARGET_IP="203.0.113.${RAND_OCTET}"). The task expects agents to extract this IP address and save it to /home/ga/submission/suspect_ip.txt. The correct IP is stored in /var/lib/app/ground_truth/origin_ip.txt for verification purposes.
